title: Throwing a stoneware casserole dish
notes: Wide-bellied casserole approximately 200 mm diameter, 100 mm deep. Stoneware-grogged for thermal shock resistance (oven-to-table). Body thrown wide, rim left wide enough for a separate thrown lid with a flange. Two small lug handles added from rolled coils at leather-hard. Casserole-fired to cone 6; tested safe for direct oven use. Covers the lid-gallery system with calipers.
